    A

    acceptConnection() - Method in class networking.Server
     
    actionTaken - Variable in class controller.CombatController
     
    activeMon - Variable in class model.Player
     
    addToDex(Mon) - Method in class model.Player
    Adds a Mon to Dex list, only if Mon is not already in Dex
    Altaria - Class in mons
     
    Altaria() - Constructor for class mons.Altaria
     
    applyEffect(Mon, Mon) - Method in class model.Move
    Abstract method that must be implemented by all subclassing moves.

    B

    backGround - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battleArea - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battleNPCHealthBar - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battleNPCHealthText - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battleNPCPokeName - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battlePlayerHealthBar - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battlePlayerHP - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battlePlayerPokeName - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battleScene - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    battleUIBattleScreen() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    battleUIBattleScreen builds a 4 quadrant group of containers that contain - Top Left: P2 Health, Top Right: P2 Mon Sprite, Bottom Left: P1 Mon Sprite and Bottom Right: P1 health.
    battleUIBottomBar() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    battleUIBottomBar creates the bar at the bottom which contains the controls for playing the game.
    battleUIPlayerMove() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates the player action section of the bottom bar, and handles button logic for basic actions like attack, run, and pokemon switch.
    battleUITesting(Stage) - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Calls necessary calls to create BattleUI Scene
    beatLevel(Challenges) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Unlocks the next level if there is one
    beatLevel(Challenges) - Method in class model.PokemonModel

    C

    category - Variable in class model.Move
     
    Category() - Constructor for enum class model.Move.Category
     
    cc - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    challenges - Variable in class model.PokemonModel
     
    challenges - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    Challenges - Class in model
    Challenges is a storage object for the levels system.
    Challenges(String, Player) - Constructor for class model.Challenges
     
    ChallengesHolder - Class in model
    ChallengesHolder is a storage object for all Challenges, as well as the creator of them.
    ChallengesHolder() - Constructor for class model.ChallengesHolder
     
    challengesList - Variable in class model.ChallengesHolder
     
    changeTurn(boolean) - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Change the current turn, used to update the turn from the controllers value.
    checkBothThreadsWait() - Method in class networking.Server
    Returns a boolean on the status of both thread#Wait booleans, used for the Server.releaseBothThreads() method.
    cleanUI() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Recreates any UI elements so they don't have duplicates when remaking any scenes
    CombatController - Class in controller
    The Controller following the MVC architecture that allows the view to cleanly interact with the various game elements.
    CombatController(Player, Player) - Constructor for class controller.CombatController
    Deprecated.
    Please use CombatController(Player, Player, Difficulty). Constructor that takes references to the two player objects that will be involved in a given fight. The Player class holds all the relevant data for each player's team
    CombatController(Player, Player, CombatController.Difficulty) - Constructor for class controller.CombatController
    Constructor that takes references to the two player objects that will be involved in a given fight.
    CombatController.Difficulty - Enum Class in controller
    Enum that controls which version of the computer AI is used by the CombatController class.
    CombatController.ReadWriteServer - Class in controller
    ReadWriteServer handles the clients networking logic.
    CombatControllerTests - Class in controller
     
    CombatControllerTests() - Constructor for class controller.CombatControllerTests
     
    connectToServer(String) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    connectToServer facilitates the clients connection to the server.
    controller - package controller
     
    Covet - Class in moves
     
    Covet() - Constructor for class moves.Covet
     
    currHp - Variable in class model.Mon

    G

    gameOver - Variable in class controller.CombatController
     
    getActiveMon() - Method in class model.Player
    Returns a reference to the current Mon in combat
    getAllMoves() - Method in class model.Mon
    Returns a reference to the entire move array.
    getAtt() - Method in class model.Mon
    Return's the Mon's attack
    getBestMove() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Finds the move with the highest power for CombatController.p2.
    getChallenges() - Method in class model.PokemonModel
     
    getChallengesAt(int) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Getter for challenges in the Challenges list at i
    getCurrHp() - Method in class model.Mon
    Returns the Mon's current health
    getDef() - Method in class model.Mon
    Return's the Mon's defence
    getEnemy() - Method in class model.Challenges
    Getter for Player object enemy
    getGameOver() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns the value of the gameOver boolean
    getID() - Method in class networking.PlayerID
     
    getIndexOf(Challenges) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Gets Index of challenge in the challenge list
    getMaxHp() - Method in class model.Mon
    Return's the Mon's max health
    getMaxPP() - Method in class model.Move
    Returns the maxPP value for the UI
    getMon(int) - Method in class model.Player
    Returns a Mon at the given index.
    getMonAt(int) - Method in class model.Player
    Getter for mon in Team at int index
    getMove(int) - Method in class model.Mon
    Returns a reference to the Move object at the provided index of the Mon.moves array.
    getMPTurn() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns the turn that is used by the thread to determine whose turn it is.
    getMultiplayer() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns a boolean that identifies if the match is a multiplayer game or not, primarily used to identify a local match in combination with the networkingMultiplayer boolean.
    getMultiplier(Move.Type, Move.Type) - Static method in class model.TypeEffectiveness
    Returns the type effectiveness multiplier of an attacking move against a defending Pokémon type.
    getName() - Method in class model.Challenges
    Getter for challenge name
    getName() - Method in class model.Mon
    Return's the Mon's name
    getName() - Method in class model.Move
    Getter for name
    getName(int) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Getter for challenge name at index i
    getName(Challenges) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Getter for challenge name
    getNetworkMultiplayer() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns the boolean value networkingMultiplayer which is used to determine if the game is a networking based multiplayer match.
    getOppSprite() - Method in class model.Mon
    Returns a String of the opponent view sprite for the current Mon.
    getp1() - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Returns the player 1 value stored in the thread.
    getP1() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns a reference to the human player/server host
    getp2() - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Returns the player 2 object stored in the thread.
    getP2() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns a reference to the computer player/client player
    getPlayer() - Method in class model.PokemonModel
     
    getPlayer1() - Method in class networking.Server
     
    getPlayer1Thread() - Method in class networking.Server.ReadWrite
     
    getPlayer2() - Method in class networking.Server
     
    getPlayer2Thread() - Method in class networking.Server.ReadWrite
     
    getPlayerID() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns the integer value of the player ID
    getPlayerMoves(int) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Convenience method to get all the moves associated the a player's active Mon.
    getPlayerSprite() - Method in class model.Mon
    Returns a String of the player view sprite for the current Mon.
    getPlayerTurn() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns a boolean value if it's the players turn.
    getPlayerTurn() - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Returns the players turn boolean.
    getPlayerTurn() - Method in class controller.PlayerTurnController
     
    getPokedexAt(int) - Method in class model.Player
    Getter for mon in Dex at int index
    getPokemonAt(int) - Method in class model.Challenges
    Getter for enemies Mon at i index
    getPower() - Method in class model.Move
    Getter for power
    getPP() - Method in class model.Move
    Used to ensure that a move isn't usable if it no longer has PP
    getRandomMove() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Selects a random move for CombatController.p2 to use.
    getRWR() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Returns the object currently running the thread.
    getSAtt() - Method in class model.Mon
    Return's the Mon's specialAttack
    getSDef() - Method in class model.Mon
    Return's the Mon's specialDefence

    Getter for team

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class networking.Server
    Static method to start the server when the "Host server" button is clicked in the multiplayer menu.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class PokemonGame
     
    mainLayout - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    mainMenu - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    mainMenuScene - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    makeChallenges() - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Creates the challenges
    makeComputerMove() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Attempts to make a valid move for CombatController.p2.
    makeMainMenu() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates the MainMenu scene
    makeMove(int, int) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Causes a player's active Mon to use the move given as a param and apply the relevant effect associated with it (typically damaging the other Mon).
    makePlayers(Mon[][]) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Creates the Player Objects with teams
    makePokedex() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates pokedex preview to see Dex and swap Mons on team
    makePreview() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates Team Preview for Enemy on level
    makeReadWriteP1Notify() - Method in class networking.Server
    Notifies server thread 1 to begin processing commands again.
    makeReadWriteP1Wait() - Method in class networking.Server
    Force server thread 1 to wait, used for timing of server updates between the players.
    makeReadWriteP2Notify() - Method in class networking.Server
    Notifies server thread 2 to begin processing commands again.
    makeReadWriteP2Wait() - Method in class networking.Server
    Force server thread 2 to wait, used for timing of server updates between the players.
    makeTeamPreview() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates Scene for teamPreview.
    makeTeams() - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
    Create any teams for Mons here for challenges
    makeUnlocks() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates unlocks Pane for unlocking new Pokemon from winning a Challenge/Level

    ReadWriteServer(ObjectInputStream, ObjectOutputStream) - Constructor for class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
     
    readWriteThread - Variable in class controller.CombatController
     
    refillPP() - Method in class model.Move
    Sets PP to maxPP
    releaseBothThreads() - Method in class networking.Server
    At the start of a game, each players client sends a copy of their play object to the server.
    replaceMon(int, Mon) - Method in class model.Player
    Replaces mon of team at index i with Mon mon.
    resetEnemy() - Method in class model.Challenges
    Resets the enemys pokemon by healing them all and giving them max PP on all moves
    resetMons() - Method in class model.Player
    Resets all mons by healing them and resetting PP on Moves
    ROCK - Enum constant in enum class model.Move.Type
     
    run() - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    run contains the logic the thread will operate on.
    run() - Method in class networking.Server.ReadWrite
    Contains all the logic in the operation of the thread split into two parts that handle either player 1 or player 2s specific requirements in the architecture of the program.
    run() - Method in class networking.Server
    Server starts the actual connection process in a way that allows for multithreading.

    S

    screen - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    selectedChallenge - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class controller.CombatController
     
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class controller.PlayerTurnController
     
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class model.Mon
     
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class model.Move
     
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class model.Player
     
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class networking.PlayerID
     
    serv - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    Server - Class in networking
    Handles the local networking between game clients.
    Server() - Constructor for class networking.Server
     
    Server.ReadWrite - Class in networking
    The ReadWrite class utilizes the socket connections made in Server.acceptConnection() to push data between the server and client.
    servSocket - Variable in class networking.Server
     
    setMPTurn(boolean) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Sets the MPTurn boolean based on the provided argument
    setMultiplayer(boolean) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Sets the multiplayer boolean as required.
    setNetworkMultiplayer(boolean) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Sets the networkingMultiplayer boolean to the provided boolean value.
    setP1(Player) - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Sets the objects player 1 to a provided Player object.
    setP1(Player) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Changes the reference to the human player/server host
    setP2(Player) - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Sets the objects player 2 to a provided Player object.
    setP2(Player) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Changes the reference to the computer player/client player
    setPlayer1Arg(Player) - Method in class networking.Server
     
    setPlayer2Arg(Player) - Method in class networking.Server
     
    setPlayerID(int) - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Sets the player ID, used during the connection process.
    setPlayerID(int) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Set the players ID, used to determine which player is which in networking games and to determine which branch of code the thread should run.
    setPlayerTurn(boolean) - Method in class controller.CombatController.ReadWriteServer
    Set the player turn, used to update the thread using the combat controllers value.
    setPlayerTurn(boolean) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Sets the current player turn boolean
    setPlayerTurn(boolean) - Method in class controller.PlayerTurnController
     
    setReadWriteThread(Thread) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Adds the thread object to the controller.
    setThread1Status(boolean) - Method in class networking.Server
     
    setThread2Status(boolean) - Method in class networking.Server
     
    setUpBattle() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Sets up the battle

    swapMon(int, int) - Method in class model.Player
    Swaps Mons on team, swaps index i and j
    swapPlayerTurn() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Swaps the player1Turn boolean, if its a networking game we update the thread with the boolean value
    switchGameOver() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Switch the gameOver boolean when the match is ended.
    switchMon(int) - Method in class model.Player
    Changes the Player.activeMon to the one at the given index in Player.mons.
    switchMon(int, int) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Calls the player object's Player.switchMon(int) method on the appropriate player.
    switchPlayerTurn() - Method in class controller.PlayerTurnController

    Reduces the Mon's currHp by a given amount.

    Unlocks challenge, switching unlock boolean to true

    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Update the battle UI based on information from the two player objects.
    updatePlayer() - Method in class networking.Server.ReadWrite
    Updates the threads player objects to the ones stored in the server.
    updatePlayers() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Updates the controller players with the players stored in the networking thread.
    updatePP() - Method in class model.Move
    Updates PP by deducting PP by 1
    updateRWR(CombatController.ReadWriteServer) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Update the controller with the thread object running the networking for the client.
    updateServerP1Thread() - Method in class networking.Server
    Update the server with thread 1s copy of the two player objects.
    updateServerP2Thread() - Method in class networking.Server
    Update the server with thread 2s copy of the two player objects.
    updateThread() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Updates the thread with the current players stored in the controller.
    updateView() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Update call the notify observers function when the thread needs to update the view and has passed that information to the controller.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class controller.CombatController.Difficulty
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class model.Move.Type
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class controller.CombatController.Difficulty
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
